label: Plead Mavuin's case
detail: Find Mavuin in the basement, hail him, and agree to plea his case to The Tribunal.

label: Complete any one Trial
detail: Complete any one of the six Trials, loot its Mark, and say 'mavuin sent me' to the Tribunal. Only one Trial is required — pick whichever your raid prefers.

label: Trial of Execution
detail: Defeat Prime Executioner Vathoch and loot the Mark of Execution.

label: Trial of Flame
detail: Defeat the Punisher of Flame and loot the Mark of Flame.

label: Trial of Lashing
detail: Defeat Lashman Akazal and loot the Mark of Lashing.

label: Trial of Stone
detail: Defeat Yurae Zhaleem and loot the Mark of Stone.

label: Trial of Suffocation
detail: Defeat Gallows Master Teion (the Hanging trial) and loot the Mark of Suffocation.

label: Trial of Torture
detail: Defeat Punisher Veshtaq and loot the Mark of Torture.

label: Mark of Justice (optional)
detail: Optional: after looting all six Trial Marks, say 'knowledge' to one of the Tribunal to receive the Mark of Justice.

label: The Seventh Hammer (optional)
detail: Optional bonus fight: click a portal behind the Tribunal to face The Seventh Hammer. One per group needs the Mark of Justice.

label: Return to Mavuin (Valor/Storms flag)
detail: Return to Mavuin and hail him. You are now flagged for Valor and Storms.

label: Preflag with Adroha Jezith
detail: Hail Adroha Jezith in the Plane of Tranquility sick bay and say 'Tortured by nightmares'.

label: Hedge: Construct of Nightmares
detail: Escort Thelin through the Maze and defeat the construct of nightmares in the Hedge event.

label: Defeat Terris Thule
detail: Enter PoNb through the gate near the Hedge and defeat Terris Thule.

label: Hail Elder Poxbourne
detail: Hail Elder Poxbourne in the Plane of Tranquility after defeating Terris Thule.

label: Preflag with Adler Fuirstel
detail: Hail Adler Fuirstel outside the Plane of Disease, talk, and say 'what ward'.

label: Defeat Grummus (CoD access)
detail: Enter Disease, defeat Grummus, and hail the Planar Projection. Opens the Crypt of Decay.

label: Jump into the pit (Crypt of Decay key-ring)
detail: Jump into the pit that opens behind Grummus to zone into the Crypt of Decay. This key-rings your personal access to CoD — easy to skip, but you'll want it.

label: Hail Elder Fuirstel (Grummus flag)
detail: Return to the sick bay in Tranquility and hail Elder Fuirstel. Receives the Grummus flag.

label: Defeat Xanamech (Factory door — optional)
detail: Optional: defeat Xanamech Nezmirthafen for access to the Factory (can be 85/15'd past).

label: Preflag with Giwin Mirakon
detail: Enter the Factory and hail the gnome. Say 'I will test the machine.'

label: Manaetic Behemoth (Tactics flag)
detail: Defeat the Manaetic Behemoth deep in the Factory, then QUICKLY hail Giwin Mirakon. Flags for Tactics.

label: Show prowess to Askr
detail: Give Askr the Lost a Storm Giant Head for Askr's Bag of Verity, then combine the Storm Volaas, Storm Satuur, and Storm Taarid drops in the bag and turn it in.

label: Bastion of Thunder flag
detail: Say 'Bastion of Thunder' to Askr for a fresh bag, combine any two Esoteric Medallions in it, and turn it in for the Talisman of Thunderous Foyer. Flags for the Bastion of Thunder.

label: Click the central stone (Bastion key-ring)
detail: Find the stone (like an unlit forge) at the center of the Plane of Storms and click it to zone into the Bastion of Thunder. Key-rings your personal access.

label: Crystalline Globe (door key)
detail: Complete the Crystalline Globe quest for the key that opens the door to Aerin`Dar. Only one person per raid needs this.

label: Defeat Aerin`Dar (HoH access)
detail: Enter Aerin`Dar's lair and defeat the prismatic dragon, then hail the Astral Projection. Flags for Halls of Honor.

label: Zone into Halls of Honor (key-ring)
detail: Zone into Halls of Honor through the Plane of Valor underground tunnel entrance. Key-rings your personal access to HoH.

label: Carpryn cycle
detail: Fight through Carpin, Ahvi, Bishop, Vindor, Raex, and High Priest Ultor Szanvon within Ruins of Lxanvom.

label: Defeat Bertoxxulous
detail: Defeat Bertoxxulous within the Crypt of Decay and hail the Planar Projection.

label: Hail Elder Fuirstel (Bertox flag)
detail: Hail Adler Fuirstel near Disease and Elder Fuirstel in the sick bay after defeating Bertox.

label: Trial: Rydda`Dar
detail: Complete Trydan Faye's trial by defeating Rydda`Dar (first of Honor's Trials).

label: Trial: Villagers
detail: Complete Rhaliq Trell's trial by saving the villagers (second of Honor's Trials).

label: Trial: Maidens
detail: Complete Alekson Garn's trial by protecting the maidens (third of Honor's Trials).

label: Defeat Lord Mithaniel Marr
detail: Enter Halls of Honor B and defeat Lord Mithaniel Marr within his temple.

label: Preflag with Fahlia Shadyglade
detail: Hail Fahlia Shadyglade in the sick bay, follow her text, and say 'I will go.'

label: Screaming Sphere Key (door key)
detail: Optional: quest a Screaming Sphere Key to open the door to Saryrn's Tower. Only one person per raid needs it.

label: Defeat the Keeper of Sorrows
detail: Talk to Tylis Newleaf to teleport the raid to the Keeper of Sorrows, then defeat it. Hail Tylis afterward.

label: Defeat Saryrn
detail: Go to the 5th floor, defeat Saryrn, and hail the Planar Projection.

label: Hail Fahlia (Saryrn flag)
detail: Return to the sick bay and hail Tylis and Fahlia after defeating the Keeper of Sorrows and Saryrn.

label: Defeat Vallon Zek
detail: Defeat Vallon Zek and hail the Planar Projection.

label: Defeat Tallon Zek
detail: Defeat Tallon Zek and hail the Planar Projection.

label: Defeat Rallos Zek the Warlord
detail: Defeat Rallos Zek the Warlord and hail the Planar Projection.

label: Symbol of Torden (Agnarr key)
detail: Combine the Blizzard, Lightning, Sandstorm, and Tornado Spheres (one drops from each tower boss) in an Unadorned Symbol of Torden to unlock the portal to Agnarr. Only one person per raid needs it.

label: Defeat Agnarr the Storm Lord
detail: Defeat Agnarr the Storm Lord, then go upstairs to Karana, hail him, and say 'I will follow the path of the Fallen.'

label: Grand Librarian: 'What Lore' (Elemental access)
detail: Hail Grand Librarian Maelin atop the Knowledge library, then say 'What Lore'. Requires the Mithaniel Marr, Saryrn, and Karana (Agnarr) flags. Opens the Elemental Planes and the Tower of Solusek Ro.

label: Grand Librarian: 'Information' (Time prep)
detail: After defeating Rallos Zek, say 'Information' to Grand Librarian Maelin. He sends you to gather the elemental essences — the first step toward the Plane of Time. (Skippable if you killed Rallos before returning to him.)

label: Miak: 'portal's destination' (Tower access)
detail: Say 'portal's destination' to Miak the Searedsoul in the Plane of Tranquility (near the Plane of Fire) to flag for and reach the Tower of Solusek Ro.

label: Mini: Xuzl
detail: Defeat the mini boss Xuzl within the Tower of Solusek Ro.

label: Mini: Arlyxir
detail: Defeat the mini boss Arlyxir within the Tower of Solusek Ro.

label: Mini: Protector of Dresolik
detail: Defeat the Protector of Dresolik within the Tower of Solusek Ro.

label: Mini: Rizlona
detail: Defeat the mini boss Rizlona within the Tower of Solusek Ro.

label: Mini: Jiva
detail: Defeat the mini boss Jiva within the Tower of Solusek Ro.

label: Defeat Solusek Ro (Plane of Fire flag)
detail: Enter the room of Solusek Ro and defeat him. Flags for the Plane of Fire.

label: Jump into the floor door (Plane of Fire key-ring)
detail: Click the door in the floor and jump down to zone into the Plane of Fire. Key-rings your personal access.

label: Wind Etched Key (port key)
detail: Say 'Plane of Air' to Sarhya the Dawnbreeze for a Pouch of Swirling Winds, then combine the four Mystical Essences (Wind, Smoke, Mist, Dust) in it for a Wind Etched Key. One person per group needs it to port the group up to Xegony.

label: Defeat Xegony, Queen of Air
detail: Defeat the Avatars of Wind for access, then defeat Xegony for the Amorphous Cloud of Air.

label: Gem-Etched Key (door key)
detail: Kill Tantisala Jaggedtooth and loot the Gem-Etched Key. One person per raid needs it to open the door to the south canyon.

label: Defeat the Mystical Arbitor (PoEb flag)
detail: Complete all four Ring Events to spawn the Mystical Arbitor and defeat it. Flags for Plane of Earth B.

label: Click the door (Plane of Earth B key-ring)
detail: Click the door to enter Plane of Earth B. No flag message, but it key-rings your personal access to PoEb.

label: Defeat the Rathe Council / Avatar of Earth
detail: Enter PoEb, defeat the Rathe Council to spawn the Avatar of Earth, and defeat it for the Mound of Living Stone.

label: Defeat Coirnav, Avatar of Water
detail: Defeat Coirnav, the Avatar of Water, for the Sphere of Coalesced Water.

label: Defeat Fennin Ro, Avatar of Fire
detail: Defeat Fennin Ro, the Avatar of Fire, for the Globe of Dancing Flame.

label: Plane of Time access
detail: Craft the Quintessence of Elements from the four elemental god drops, hail Grand Librarian Maelin with it in hand, then see Chronographer Muan in the Plane of Innovation Factory and click the Time Machine to enter the Plane of Time.
